short_summary: Artificial voice is framed as realistic expressive and human like.
notes: Good exit marker from realistic into human process.

short_summary: Artificial language is explicitly defined against natural language.
Artificial life is a simulation and process term rather than a fake object term.
Artificial intelligence directly relocates artificial into human cognitive process territory.
Artificial neural network borrows brain structure as a model for computational learning.
notes: Useful but more technical than AI.

short_summary: Artificial consciousness remains hypothetical and philosophically loaded.
notes: Keep as notes only or needs review.

short_summary: Artificial creativity is discussed as a non authentic generative mechanism.
notes: Good edge marker but overreaches quickly.

short_summary: Companionship terms move artificial toward social presence rather than mere material fabrication.
Current public discourse prefers agentic AI to artificial agent.
